recommendations.title: The Antichrist
recommendations.overview: An Italian nobleman seeks help after his paralyzed daughter becomes possessed by the spirit of a malevolent ancestress.

recommendations.title: The Gallows Act II
recommendations.overview: When Auna Rue transfers to a prestigious new acting school, she encounters a malevolent spirit after participating in a viral challenge.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: Replicas
recommendations.overview: A scientist becomes obsessed with returning his family to normalcy after a terrible accident.

recommendations.title: The Way Back
recommendations.overview: A former basketball all-star, who has lost his wife and family foundation in a struggle with addiction, attempts to regain his soul and salvation by becoming the coach of a disparate ethnically mixed high school basketball team at his alma mater.

recommendations.title: Night Shift
recommendations.overview: A young nurse with a domestic abuse past starts working the night shift at a small hospital, where, during the night, the ghost of a nurse materializes.

recommendations.title: Guzaarish
recommendations.overview: Ethan, a magician rendered paralyzed in an accident, sets off a furor when he makes a petition to the court to end his own life.

recommendations.title: Walk. Ride. Rodeo.
recommendations.overview: Tells the incredible true story of Amberley Snyder, a nationally ranked rodeo barrel racer who defies the odds after barely surviving a car accident that leaves her paralyzed from the waist down.

recommendations.title: Breaking the Waves
recommendations.overview: In a small, conservative Scottish village, an oilman is paralyzed in an accident. His wife, who prayed for his return, feels guilty; even more, when he urges her to have sex with another.
